heading: Sea grant colleges and sea grant institutes
label: 1126 Sea grant colleges and sea grant institutes
notes: Amendments2020—Subsec. (b). , added par. (1), designated existing provisions as par. (2), and inserted par. (2) heading.Pub. (e), was executed to this section, which is section 207 of the National Sea Grant College Program Act, to reflect the probable intent of Congress. Prior to amendment, subsec. children.text: be recognized for excellence in fields related to ocean, coastal, and Great Lakes resources (including marine resources management and science), as determined by the Secretary; and

children.label: F
children.text: meet such other qualifications as the Secretary, in consultation with the Board, considers necessary or appropriate.

children.text: maintains a program of research, extension services, training, and education in fields related to ocean, coastal, and Great Lakes resources.

children.label: B
children.text: maintains a program which includes, at a minimum, research and extension services.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Not less than 30 days before designating an institution, or an association or alliance of two or more such institutions, as a sea grant college or sea grant institute under subsection (a), the Secretary shall notify Congress in writing of the proposed designation. The notification shall include an evaluation and justification for the designation.

children.heading: Effect of joint resolution of disapproval
children.label: B Effect of joint resolution of disapproval
children.text: The Secretary may not designate an institution, or an association or alliance of two or more such institutions, as a sea grant college or sea grant institute under subsection (a) if, before the end of the 30-day period described in subparagraph (A), a joint resolution disapproving the designation is enacted.

children.heading: Existing designees
children.label: 2 Existing designees
children.text: Any institution, or association or alliance of two or more such institutions, designated as a sea grant college or awarded institutional program status by the Director prior to , shall not have to reapply for designation as a sea grant college or sea grant institute, respectively, after , if the Director determines that the institution, or association or alliance of institutions, meets the qualifications in subsection (a).March 6, 1998March 6, 1998

children.heading: Suspension or termination of designation
children.label: c Suspension or termination of designation
children.text: The Secretary may, for cause and after an opportunity for hearing, suspend or terminate any designation under subsection (a).
